strengths: 15+ years of fullstack experience spanning TypeScript, Node.js, and React across multiple senior roles
Current hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators aligns with AI agent requirement
Strong engineering craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and teaching/workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in resume
Limited evidence of Kotlin experience; Java exposure appears dated (robotic arms work circa 2016-2018)
Cloud platform experience narrow — AWS via CDK at Optilyz, no clear GCP/Azure or Kubernetes-at-scale production signal beyond self-hosted GISCollective
response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned fullstack engineer well past the 6+ years bar, with a current role directly involving AI-agent tooling and MCP work that maps cleanly to the AI agent requirement. Core TypeScript/Node/React proficiency, testing discipline, and architecture exposure are strong, though Nest.js is not explicitly listed and Kotlin/Java experience is thin and somewhat dated. Overall profile aligns well with an internal automation tooling role emphasizing fullstack delivery and agentic workflows.
